prompt: Create a moody cinematic fashion portrait in landscape 16:9. A young androgynous model with dark slicked-back hair is shown from the shoulders up against a soft teal-blue textured studio background. The model is slightly off-center, with only the top hairline, one ear, neck, and shoulders partially visible because a large opaque square censor block covers the entire face and central head area. The square is centered over the face, about one-third of the image width, with a subtle vertical gradient from dark charcoal teal at the top-left to muted gray-green at the right, perfectly sharp edges and no text. The subject wears a dramatic black sheer tulle ruffled collar or voluminous translucent fabric spreading across the lower half of the frame, semi-transparent and smoky, with layered folds. Lighting is low-key and atmospheric, cool cyan and deep blue color grading, soft film grain, shallow depth of field, high-fashion editorial mood, minimal composition, no visible eyes, no facial features, no logos, no watermark.
